hero.headline: Your Space Coast Pool, Always Crystal Clear
hero.subheadline: Stop guessing if your pool water is safe. Atlantic Coastline Pools delivers detailed post-visit reports with exact chemistry readings after every service, so you always know your family is swimming in clean, balanced water. Titusville's trusted family-owned pool care.
checkmarks: Detailed water chemistry reports every visit

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Patio Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for the Space Coast
services.subtitle: From routine weekly maintenance to deep cleans and patio restoration, we handle every detail so you can enjoy your backyard oasis worry-free.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Skimming, brushing, vacuuming, chemical balancing, and filter cleaning on a schedule that fits your life. Every visit ends with a detailed report documenting water chemistry levels.

cards.title: Chemical Balancing
cards.description: Precise water analysis and pH, chlorine, and alkalinity adjustments that prevent algae growth and skin irritation. Your pool stays safe, clear, and comfortable for every swim.

cards.title: One-Time Deep Cleans
cards.description: Pool looking neglected? Our thorough deep cleaning service restores even the most tired pools to sparkling condition, from waterline scrubbing to filter overhauls.

cards.title: Patio Pressure Washing
cards.description: High-powered pressure washing removes years of algae, mildew, and grime from your deck and patio surfaces. Optional sealing protects against Florida's intense sun and rain.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Services
cards.description: Professional-grade cleaning and maintenance for HOA pools, hotels, and commercial properties across the Space Coast. Reliable scheduling and compliance-ready documentation.

cards.title: Flexible Maintenance Plans
cards.description: Choose weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly service to match your pool's needs and your budget. Upgrade, downgrade, or pause anytime with no contracts or cancellation fees.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Sparkling Pool

steps.title: Book Your Free Checkup
steps.description: Call or fill out the form. Seth will visit your pool, inspect the water chemistry, equipment, and surfaces, and give you an honest assessment with a no-obligation estimate.

steps.title: We Handle Everything
steps.description: Our certified technicians arrive on schedule with eco-friendly products. After every visit, you receive a detailed report showing water chemistry readings and exactly what was done.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, your patio stays spotless, and you get your weekends back. If anything is ever less than perfect, we make it right at no extra cost.

about.label: Why Titusville Trusts Atlantic Coastline Pools
about.headline: Family-Owned Means Every Pool Gets Personal Attention
about.description: Founded in 2024 by Seth Bruton, Atlantic Coastline Pools was born from a simple belief: pool care should be transparent, reliable, and personal. As a family-owned Space Coast business, we treat every backyard like our own. We use only eco-friendly cleaning products and provide detailed post-visit reports with exact water chemistry readings, because you deserve to know exactly what is happening with your pool, not just trust that someone showed up.

features.title: Certified & Fully Insured
features.description: Every technician is trained, certified, and insured. You get professional-grade care with complete peace of mind and zero liability.

features.title: Transparent Reporting After Every Visit
features.description: No guesswork. After each service, you receive a detailed report showing initial water readings, chemicals added, and final levels. Full visibility, every time.

features.title: 100% Eco-Friendly Products
features.description: We use environmentally responsible cleaning products that are tough on algae and grime but gentle on your family, pets, and the Florida ecosystem.

pricing.headline: Simple Pricing. No Contracts. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your pool and your budget. Switch or cancel anytime with zero fees. Every plan includes post-visit water chemistry reports.

guarantee.headline: Our "Sparkling Clean" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool is not sparkling after any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will return to make it right at absolutely no charge. We also guarantee that every visit includes a detailed water chemistry report delivered to you, because transparency is not optional, it is how we do business. That is the Atlantic Coastline promise.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. We offer a free initial pool checkup so we can assess your pool's condition and recommend the right service plan before any commitment.

faqs.question: What is included in the free pool checkup?
faqs.answer: We inspect your pool's water chemistry, equipment condition, surface integrity, and filtration system. You receive a written assessment with recommendations and a no-obligation estimate. There is zero pressure to sign up.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. After each visit, you receive a detailed service report with water chemistry readings so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: What makes your eco-friendly products different?
faqs.answer: Our cleaning products are formulated to be effective against algae, bacteria, and stains while being safe for children, pets, and Florida's local waterways. You get a cleaner pool without harsh chemical residue.

faqs.question: Can I switch between weekly, bi-weekly, and monthly plans?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer flexible scheduling with no contracts or cancellation fees. You can upgrade, downgrade, or pause your service at any time. We earn your loyalty with results, not paperwork.

testimonials.name: John S.
testimonials.text: You will not find a better pool cleaning service anywhere. Seth and his team are fantastic. They always show up on time and my pool looks incredible after every visit.

testimonials.name: Ryan E.
testimonials.text: Atlantic Coastline Pools is an AMAZING pool cleaning service! Seth takes great pride cleaning my pool. You can tell he genuinely cares about doing quality work.

testimonials.name: Verified Customer
testimonials.text: Very professional and knows what he is doing. Left my pool crystal clear. The detailed report after each visit is a nice touch that no other company has ever provided.
